title: xieguigang/LLMs

title: tobocop2/obsidian-lilbee
summary: Obsidian community plugin: your vault as a private, self-hosted NotebookLM alternative. A built-in manager downloads and runs local AI models in one click, or use your Ollama and LM Studio. Cited answers from notes, PDFs, and code. Crawl websites into your library.

title: edtireli/spiral
summary: Local-first autonomous coding CLI — plans, builds, verifies, and validates against a spec, entirely on your own hardware.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: AI Data Engineering Healthcare Platform: PySpark Medallion Lakehouse, Airflow DAGs, 5 ML Models, Local LLM RAG, and FastAPI Clinical Architecture.

title: tcsenpai/dw
summary: Agentic DeepWiki on demand: clone any git repo, embed it locally (ollama/LM Studio/OpenAI), and ask questions answered by an LLM grounded in retrieved code with citations. TUI + WebUI, Docker-first.

title: georgejieh/REED
summary: Self-hosted AI agent that researches US market news on a schedule and publishes structured briefs to a terminal-style dashboard. Bring your own LLM.

title: Sevoriaai/sevoria
summary: Sevoria — a sharp, honest AI assistant. Private by design, running on its own models. Web + native Android app.

title: wangzhe04/ruyi-workbench-oss
summary: 开源 Windows 本地 AI 工作台｜OpenAI-compatible + Claude CLI，99 个桌面/Office 工具，可回退文件操作与可视化多 Agent 工作流。

title: langbot-app/LangBot
summary: Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台/ Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Matrix e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, GLM, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, openclaw / hermes agent, deerflow

title: bgill55/daedalus
summary: Daedalus is a standalone terminal-based AI coding assistant that runs on your machine. It connects to local LLM servers (LM Studio, Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM) or remote providers (OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Anthropic), routes requests intelligently, and gives your AI agent access to your file system, terminal, git, web search, and codebase indexing

title: chipi/agentic-ai-homelab
summary: How I work with agentic AI: personal patterns, homelab infra (vLLM, Ollama, Grafana Alloy, LibreChat), project scaffolding. Not best practices - what I run.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli

title: rodelgithub/local-llm-bridge
summary: Unlock AI Coding with OpenCode Local Provider 2026 - Auto-Detect Ollama LM Studio

title: ram0verflow/continuumd
summary: A local memory daemon for LLMs. Treats the context window like RAM: a kernel pages relevant history in and out on demand, the model asks for more when it's missing something, everything is versioned on disk."

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: ebongard/renfield
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant with voice satellites, 100+ tool integrations, RAG knowledge base, and full offline capability. Built with FastAPI + React + Ollama.
